channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ JOHN CARPENTER TO RELEASE METAL ALBUM & GRAPHIC NOVEL 'CATHEDRAL' ☠⚡
item.description:
🔥🤘 Oh hell yes, metalheads and crypto crusaders! Buckle up because the legend himself, JOHN MOTHERF*CKING CARPENTER, is about to hit us with a double dose of chaos! This ain’t just another pretty face in the horror director realm—he’s unleashing a METAL ALBUM and a graphic novel titled ‘CATHEDRAL’ that’s bound to make your skull rattle! 🤘🔥
🎸🔥 Carpenter’s diving deep into the abyss and bringing the thunder with his new track "Lord of the Underground"! It’s like a hellish symphony that screams from the crypt! This ain't your grandma's soundtrack—this is pure adrenaline-fueled, riff-heavy insanity! 🖤💀
Imagine flipping through the pages of a GRAPHIC NOVEL that pairs seamlessly with the savage sounds of shredding guitars! We’re talking about a digital art gallery that slingshots you into a realm of darkness and glory, where horror meets heavy metal in a glorious explosion! 💥
So crank those amps up to eleven and get ready to mosh! The dark maestro is about to take the stage, and you won’t want to miss the carnage! More blood, more riffs, more rebellion—Carpenter is back, baby, and he’s got the crypto coin to back it all up! 🔥💰🤘
Stay tuned, metal maniacs, because ‘CATHEDRAL’ is rage incarnate, and we’re ready to thrash our way through the underground! ⚡💀 Don’t forget to check it out on Metal Injection, or risk being left in the dust of mediocrity! 🏴‍☠️👊 \m/
#DeathMetal #MetalCulture #MetalCommunity #Metal #HeavyMetal
item.content:encoded:
🔥🤘 Oh hell yes, metalheads and crypto crusaders! Buckle up because the legend himself, JOHN MOTHERF*CKING CARPENTER, is about to hit us with a double dose of chaos! This ain’t just another pretty face in the horror director realm—he’s unleashing a METAL ALBUM and a graphic novel titled ‘CATHEDRAL’ that’s bound to make your skull rattle! 🤘🔥
🎸🔥 Carpenter’s diving deep into the abyss and bringing the thunder with his new track "Lord of the Underground"! It’s like a hellish symphony that screams from the crypt! This ain't your grandma's soundtrack—this is pure adrenaline-fueled, riff-heavy insanity! 🖤💀
Imagine flipping through the pages of a GRAPHIC NOVEL that pairs seamlessly with the savage sounds of shredding guitars! We’re talking about a digital art gallery that slingshots you into a realm of darkness and glory, where horror meets heavy metal in a glorious explosion! 💥
So crank those amps up to eleven and get ready to mosh! The dark maestro is about to take the stage, and you won’t want to miss the carnage! More blood, more riffs, more rebellion—Carpenter is back, baby, and he’s got the crypto coin to back it all up! 🔥💰🤘
Stay tuned, metal maniacs, because ‘CATHEDRAL’ is rage incarnate, and we’re ready to thrash our way through the underground! ⚡💀 Don’t forget to check it out on Metal Injection, or risk being left in the dust of mediocrity! 🏴‍☠️👊 \m/
#DeathMetal #MetalCulture #MetalCommunity #Metal #HeavyMetal
